es.name: Calculadora Deposito Plazo
es.desc: Calcula Interés = Capital × (1 + Tasa/n)^(n×t) - Capital. Ejemplo: 10.000 € al 3,5 % anual, 1 año, capitalización mensual = Interés = 355,77 €; Total = 10.355,77 €....

es.result_context: The intereses of {intereses} is earned over the term. The total of {total} is returned at maturity.
mistakes: Not checking early withdrawal penalties before investing
Confusing nominal rate with effective annual rate
Forgetting to compare with inflation for real returns

en.name: Fixed Deposit Calculator
